title: Glimmer Glow Glee
poem_text:
Dapple dip the mizzle moon,
Wobble wisp in silver swoon.
Flicker flit the snickle sea,
Tumble tum the bumble bee.
Pipple pop the fluffernut,
Whisper whirl the zizzle shut.
Glimmer glow the dreamy deep,
Where the wondrous wonders sleep.
cover_context: A swirling night sky with a glowing moon, tiny floating lights, and a curious child peeking through a window.
style_prompt: Children's musical poem, ukulele and soft bongos, 105 BPM, dreamy and wondering, spacious, leaves room to think, clear warm vocal, every word easy to understand
